name: GCP Container Critical Vulnerabilities Addressed
description: Ensures critical vulnerabilities in GCP container images are remediated within SLA (7 days)
remediation: Update container images to address critical vulnerabilities. Rebuild and redeploy containers with patched base images.
remediation_steps: Identify affected container images in GCR/Artifact Registry
Review vulnerability details in Container Analysis
Update base images or application dependencies
Deploy updated images to GKE clusters
